data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'dd Month yyyy') as requestm ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date,'Month') as start_keep_date_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date,'yyyy') as start_keep_date_thai_year ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as position ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name
--ที่อยู่ทะเบียนบ้าน ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 6 ) as address_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 8 ) as moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 7 ) as mooban ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 10 ) as soi ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 9 ) as road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 11 ) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 12 ) as district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 13 ) as province ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 14 ) as postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, '1' , 15 ) as telephone
,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_approve_amount_thai ,(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_intrate(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type)*100)as int_rate ,sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai( sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount ) as period_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount ) as loan_installment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.last_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_numberthai( sc_lon_m_contract.last_payment_amount ) as last_payment_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'dd Month yyyy') as begining_of_contract_date
,(select marriage_status from sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status where sc_mem_m_ucf_marriage_status.marriage_status_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status) as marriage_status ,fpa_com_marriage(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as spname ,(select id_card from sc_mem_m_member_spouse_info where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as sp_id_card ,to_char(sysdate, 'DD/MM/YYYY-HH24:MI:SS')||'-'||sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer as entry_id ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ) as group_district ,( select sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_province where sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code ) as province_addr
--บันทึกข้อความ ,(select share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_mem where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock ,(select sum(principal_balance) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as principal_balance ,(select sum(req_amount) from sc_lon_m_req_coll where loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no) as req_amount ,(select si_security_user.user_name from si_security_user where user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer) as entry_name
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where 1=2 --and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no --and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type --and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ส6800799' --order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no asc
